title: pulicaria undulata subsp. candidissima
intro: Pulicaria undulata subsp. candidissima, commonly known as wild tobacco or white-leaved fleabane, is a perennial herb belonging to the Asteraceae family. Traditionally, this plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, making it beneficial for treating various health issues. The health benefits of Pulicaria undulata subsp. candidissima include soothing sore throats, reducing fever, and aiding in digestion, as well as exhibiting antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, allowing individuals to harness its medicinal properties in a convenient and accessible way.
